Loci Orthopaedics Ltd participates in 2025 IFSSH and IFSHT Congress in Galway, Ireland. Hosted by American societies, prestigious event gathers global hand care experts.
news.summary: In Galway, Ireland, Loci Orthopaedics Ltd, a clinical stage orthopaedic medical device company, is excited to share its involvement in the renowned Triennial Congress of the International Federation of Societies for Surgery of the Hand (IFSSH) and International Federation of Societies for Hand Therapy (IFSHT). This event, hosted by the American Society for Surgery of the Hand, American Society of Hand Therapists, and American Association for Hand Surgery, is currently held in Galway.

news.headline: 2024 Dodgers World Championship final pitch ball auctioned by Will Smith & wife Cara; proceeds benefit LA fire relief.
news.summary: LA Dodgers catcher Will Smith and his wife, Cara, are auctioning a baseball through the Catching Hope Foundation, with all proceeds going towards Los Angeles fire relief efforts. The auction is in its final week and will end on April 5. The ball can be viewed at the Art of the Game display on the field level behind home plate for the Braves series.

Is Cardano (ADA) a "zombie crypto"? Despite its high market cap, ADA's DeFi adoption lags behind; struggles with liquidity. 2025 pivotal with ETF and Bitcoin's DeFi. Watch more on Cointelegraph YouTube.
news.summary: Cardano (ADA) has been a prominent player in the crypto market for years but its performance has raised concerns among investors. While it was recently part of a national crypto stockpile proposal by US President Trump, its price action and onchain activity have been lackluster leading to some calling it a "zombie." The Cardano network is lagging behind in DeFi adoption with significantly lower Total Value Locked (TVL) compared to Ethereum and Solana. Despite arguments that its DeFi sector is in early stages, newer blockchains have surpassed it in user engagement and trading volume. With upcoming developments like a potential ADA ETF and its role in Bitcoin’s DeFi ecosystem, 2025 could be a crucial year for ADA. Whether these catalysts can reverse the current trend remains uncertain. Check out the full analysis on the Cointelegraph YouTube channel.

news.headline: Colombia Construction Industry projected to grow by 7.6% annually, reaching COP 80.51 billion by 2025.
news.summary: An updated report on the Colombia Construction Industry reveals promising growth projections. The market is anticipated to expand by 7.6% annually, with expectations to reach a value of COP 80.51. The report covers over 40 market segments including Residential, Commercial, Industrial, Institutional, and Infrastructure construction. Additionally, it provides insights on city-level construction values and construction cost structures. This valuable information is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com for those interested in the industry trends and forecasts.

news.headline: S&P Global Mobility projects March 2025 US auto sales to hit over 1.45 million units due to tariffs, consumer demand.
news.summary: A forecast by S&P Global Mobility anticipates that auto sales in the U.S. for March will surpass 1.45 million units. This surge in sales is attributed to both consumers and automakers striving to mitigate the implications of tariffs. The data suggests a notable growth in the automotive sector as market trends indicate a strong demand for vehicles.

news.headline: Bitcoin could drop to $72K due to macro liquidity conditions. BTC price fell 3.5% to $84,120 on Mar 28 amidst market uncertainties.
news.summary: After a positive start to the week, Bitcoin price dropped 3.5% to $84,120 on March 28, below the 200-day EMA, signaling potential downside. Analysts at Capital Flows predict a correction to $72,000-$75,000 if liquidity remains unchanged. Global M2 money supply growth could trigger a rally, correlating with Bitcoin price movements. Some analysts foresee a BTC rally by May 1 based on this correlation. Bitcoin filled a CME futures gap at $84,435-$85,000, potentially leading to a short-term bounce. Analysts suggest immediate support at $76,700, warning of possible new lows in 2025. It's a "do or die" scenario for Bitcoin, with upside potential hinging on market dynamics. This article doesn't offer investment advice, highlighting the risks involved in trading decisions.

news.headline: Global HVAC industry transforming with IoT, cloud computing, AI, sustainability, enhancing building efficiency and customer experience.
news.summary: In London on March 28, 2025, it was reported that the HVAC sector worldwide is experiencing significant changes due to the integration of IoT, cloud computing, AI, and sustainability efforts. This transformation is reshaping the way heating, ventilation, and air conditioning systems operate, with key players adapting to this evolution. The industry is witnessing a shift towards smarter, more efficient technologies, highlighting the increasing importance of energy efficiency and environmental sustainability.

news.headline: Baidu's Apollo Go partners with Dubai RTA to deploy 100 robotaxis by end of 2025, 1,000 in 3 years, marks major expansion.
news.summary: By the end of 2025, Dubai aims to have 100 Apollo Go self-driving vehicles operating in the city, with plans to increase this number to at least 1,000 within the next three years. This move signifies a significant achievement in Apollo Go's global growth strategy, following the approval of the initial autonomous vehicle testing program.

news.headline: Canada's largest Asian grocery store, T&T Supermarket, expands to San Francisco in March 2025, enhancing the shopping experience.
news.summary: Canada's leading Asian grocery store, T&T Supermarket, has introduced an innovative shopping experience in San Francisco. The renowned retailer has ventured into the city, marking a significant milestone in its journey. T&T Supermarket, known for its extensive selection of Asian products, opens its doors in San Francisco on March 28, 2025. The expansion brings a range of exciting shopping opportunities to the area. Established as the largest Asian grocery chain in Canada, T&T Supermarket's move to San Francisco is set to offer residents access to a diverse array of products and culinary delights. This development showcases the brand's commitment to growth and meeting the needs of customers.

KBRA report on March 2025 CMBS loan performance shows delinquency rate at 6.8%, distress rate at 9.8%. Mixed-use sector delinquency rose to 9.8%.
news.summary: In a recent report by KBRA on U.S. commercial mortgage-backed securities (CMBS) loan performance in March 2025, it was revealed that the delinquency rate for KBRA-rated U.S. private label CMBS rose to 6.8% from 6.6% in February. The overall distress rate, which includes delinquent and current but specially serviced loans, saw an increase of 24 basis points to reach 9.8%. Specifically, the delinquency rate in the mixed-use sector surged by 192 basis points to 9.8%. These figures highlight the ongoing challenges in the CMBS market, indicating a concerning trend in loan performance.

news.headline: Premier real estate developer Terra Innovations opens The Office at Ponte Vedra Beach, a luxury workspace designed for professionals at 510 A1A N, Florida.
news.summary: Terra Innovations, Inc., a leading luxury real estate developer, has revealed the launch of The Office at Ponte Vedra Beach in Florida. Situated at 510 A1A N, this exclusive workspace aims to combine productivity, wellness, and luxury for professionals. The Office provides a tailored experience for individuals seeking a balance between work and lifestyle. This innovative workspace caters to discerning professionals and is designed to offer the ultimate blend of work and relaxation. For more information, visit www.officepvb.com.

news.headline: AstroNova adds Darius G. Nevin, 67, to Board of Directors, expanding to 6 members; Nevin to serve on key committees.
news.summary: A data visualization technology leader, AstroNova, Inc. (Nasdaq: ALOT), based in West Warwick, R.I., has added Darius G. Nevin, aged 67, to its Board of Directors. This appointment expands the Board to six members, with Mr. Nevin being the fifth independent director. He is set to work on the Audit Committee and Human Capital and Compensation Committee. AstroNova aims to benefit from Mr. Nevin's extensive financial expertise as a seasoned financial executive and a skilled public company director.

InventHelp inventors create luggage rack accessory (PLB-418) to accommodate modern clamshell-style suitcases.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on March 28, 2025, it was reported that there have been significant transformations in suitcase design over the years, however, the devices utilized by travelers to store suitcases have remained unchanged. Conventional luggage stands are unable to support the modern clamshell-style suitcases that open like a book and lay flat. As a result, there is a rising need for innovative storage solutions to cater to these popular suitcases.

Travelers are showing a strong interest in visiting destinations that offer a refreshing escape from the heat, with a significant increase in bookings to cool locations. This trend highlights a growing preference for seeking cooler climates during summer holidays.
